defects.desc: Django app named 'operator' shadows stdlib operator module; web cannot boot (collections imports operator at startup)

defects.fix: replaced importlib file-path hack with normal import

defects.desc: @operator_admin_site.register(Model) used as decorator; AdminSite.register returns None -> admin import crash
gunicorn missing from requirements.txt though Dockerfile/compose CMD invoke it -> container cannot start
accounts/login.html template missing -> resident login view 500 (TemplateDoesNotExist)

discovered_during: local services bring-up after fresh-host setup
resolution: Defects 1-4 fixed in working tree (uncommitted); defect 5 logged, template still to be authored.
summary: Step 10 build shipped through full required sign-off chain (code-review, security, ui, a11y, test-unit, test-system, process) + admin red-team, but the app had never been booted; 5 boot/run-blocking defects found.
